results.title: GET /projects/shared no longer crashes API
results.notes: Endpoint returns 200 with empty paginated result. No 502 crash.

results.title: Invite accept requires email match
results.notes: Returns 400 (invalid token). Not 200. The fix correctly rejects mismatched/invalid invite tokens. 400 is acceptable — token is fake so it fails validation before email-match check can run. Core intent verified: no spurious 200.

results.title: Built-in connectors cannot be deleted
results.notes: All three built-in connectors confirmed present (Markdown Builder, PDF Builder, Presentation Builder, Spreadsheet Builder). DELETE on Markdown Builder returns 403 with explicit error message.

results.title: Invalid framework returns 400
results.notes: Returns 400 with structured validation error listing allowed frameworks. Not 403 or 500.

results.title: WebSocket rejects cross-origin connections
results.command: Upgrade request to https://dev-ws.doable.me/ with Origin: https://evil.example.com
results.notes: WS server returns HTTP 403 with body 'Forbidden origin' for disallowed origin. Does not return 101 Switching Protocols.

results.title: Folder self-referential parent rejected
results.response_body: {"error":"A folder cannot be its own parent"}
results.notes: Folder created successfully (201), then PATCH with self as parentId returns 400 with explicit error. Test folder ID: 7875f9e6-d163-4593-92e0-1149fd65e8f1.
